title: FighterOdds.ai
description: FighterOdds.ai is an AI-powered MMA tipster dedicated to finding and recommending high-value bets from more than 20 bookmakers.

title: Deep Combat (PoC)
description: Deep Combat analyzes fighting game sessions using Machine Vision to extract and visualize metrics in near real-time.

title: Teknoboxa - Neon Arenas
description: Teknoboxa - Neon Arenas is a pocket-sized, 1-vs-1 tabletop fighting game with a cyberpunk aesthetic, featuring unique characters and abilities.
